description: Provider-neutral OpenDeepThink reasoning server: generate, judge, rank, mutate.
name: io.github.linxule/deepthonk

environmentVariables.description: API key for the DeepSeek provider. Optional: omit to use MCP sampling or another provider.
environmentVariables.name: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for the OpenRouter provider. Optional: omit to use MCP sampling or another provider.
environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for a custom openai-compatible provider endpoint. Optional.
environmentVariables.name: DEEPTHONK_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Directory of custom profile YAML files. Defaults to the config directory's profiles/.
environmentVariables.name: DEEPTHONK_PROFILES_DIR

packageArguments.description: The deepthonk bin has no default action; serve-mcp starts the stdio MCP server.

title: DeepThonk
